---
title: "explorative"
format: html
---

## Photoperiod

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  filter(photoperiod.state == "day") |> 
  aggregate_Datetime(unit = "1 day",
                     numeric.handler = median,
                     photoperiod = mean(photoperiod)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x=photoperiod, y = MEDI)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = site))+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  scale_color_manual(values = melidos_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "symlog", breaks = c(0, 10^(0:5))) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  labs(y = "Daily daytime median melanopic EDI (lx)") +
  guides(color = "none")

ggsave("figures/exploration/photoperiod_median.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  filter(photoperiod.state == "day") |> 
  aggregate_Datetime(unit = "1 day",
                     numeric.handler = mean,
                     photoperiod = mean(photoperiod)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x=photoperiod, y = MEDI)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = site))+
  geom_smooth(method = "lm") +
  scale_color_manual(values = melidos_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "symlog", breaks = c(0, 10^(0:5))) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  labs(y = "Daily daytime mean melanopic EDI (lx)") +
  guides(color = "none")

ggsave("figures/exploration/photoperiod_mean.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

## Demographics 

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  left_join(demographics, by = c("site", "Id")) |> 
  # filter(photoperiod.state == "day") |> 
  group_by(sex) |> 
  aggregate_Date(
    unit = "1 hour",
    numeric.handler = \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    date.handler = \(x) as_date("2025-01-01")
  ) |> 
  gg_doubleplot(geom = "line",
                aes_col = sex,
                facetting = FALSE,
                linewidth = 1,
                alpha = 1)

ggsave("figures/exploration/sex.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  left_join(demographics, by = c("site", "Id")) |> 
  # filter(photoperiod.state == "day") |> 
  aggregate_Datetime(unit = "1 day",
                     numeric.handler = mean,
                     photoperiod = mean(photoperiod)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x=age, y = MEDI)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = site))+
  geom_smooth(method = "gam") +
  scale_color_manual(values = melidos_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "symlog", breaks = c(0, 10^(0:5))) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  labs(y = "Daily mean melanopic EDI (lx)") +
  guides(color = "none")

ggsave("figures/exploration/age.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

## Chronotype

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  left_join(chronotype, by = c("site", "Id")) |> 
  # filter(photoperiod.state == "day") |> 
  aggregate_Datetime(unit = "1 day",
                     numeric.handler = mean,
                     photoperiod = mean(photoperiod)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x=msf_sc, y = MEDI)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = site))+
  geom_smooth(method = "gam") +
  scale_color_manual(values = melidos_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "symlog", breaks = c(0, 10^(0:5))) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  labs(y = "Daily mean melanopic EDI (lx)",
       x = "Chronotype (Mid-sleep free days, sleep corrected)") +
  guides(color = "none")

ggsave("figures/exploration/msf_sc.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  left_join(chronotype, by = c("site", "Id")) |> 
  group_by(meq_type) |> 
  aggregate_Date(
    unit = "1 hour",
    numeric.handler = \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    date.handler = \(x) as_date("2025-01-01")
  ) |> 
  gg_doubleplot(geom = "line",
                aes_col = meq_type,
                facetting = FALSE,
                linewidth = 1,
                alpha = 1) +
  labs(color = "Circadian preference (MEQ)")

ggsave("figures/exploration/meq_type.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

## Sleep

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  # filter(photoperiod.state == "day") |> 
  aggregate_Datetime(unit = "1 day",
                     numeric.handler = mean,
                     photoperiod = mean(photoperiod)) |> 
  add_Date_col() |> 
  left_join(sleep|> mutate(Date = date(wake)), by = c("site", "Id", "Date")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x=sleep_duration, y = MEDI)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = site))+
  geom_smooth(method = "gam") +
  scale_color_manual(values = melidos_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "symlog", breaks = c(0, 10^(0:5))) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  labs(y = "Daily mean melanopic EDI (lx)",
       x = "Sleep duration (hrs)") +
  guides(color = "none")

ggsave("figures/exploration/sleepduration.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  # filter(photoperiod.state == "day") |> 
  aggregate_Datetime(unit = "1 day",
                     numeric.handler = mean,
                     photoperiod = mean(photoperiod)) |> 
  add_Date_col() |> 
  left_join(sleep|> mutate(Date = date(wake)), by = c("site", "Id", "Date")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x=hms::as_hms(wake), y = MEDI)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = site))+
  geom_smooth(method = "gam") +
  scale_color_manual(values = melidos_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "symlog", breaks = c(0, 10^(0:5))) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  labs(y = "Daily mean melanopic EDI (lx)",
       x = "Wake time") +
  guides(color = "none")

ggsave("figures/exploration/waketime.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  add_Date_col() |> 
  left_join(sleep|> mutate(Date = date(wake)), by = c("site", "Id", "Date")) |> 
  group_by(daytype2) |> 
  aggregate_Date(
    unit = "1 hour",
    numeric.handler = \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    date.handler = \(x) as_date("2025-01-01")
  ) |> 
  filter_out(is.na(daytype2)) |> 
  gg_doubleplot(geom = "line",
                aes_col = fct_rev(daytype2),
                facetting = FALSE,
                linewidth = 1,
                alpha = 1) +
  labs(color = "Daytype")

ggsave("figures/exploration/daytype.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  add_Date_col(as.wday = TRUE) |> 
  group_by(weekend = as.numeric(Date) > 5) |> 
  aggregate_Date(
    unit = "1 hour",
    numeric.handler = \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    date.handler = \(x) as_date("2025-01-01")
  ) |> 
  gg_doubleplot(geom = "line",
                aes_col = weekend,
                facetting = FALSE,
                linewidth = 1,
                alpha = 1) +
  labs(color = "Weekend")

ggsave("figures/exploration/weekend.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

## Exercise

```{r}
exercise <- load_data("exercisediary") |> flatten_data()
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  aggregate_Datetime(unit = "1 day",
                     numeric.handler = mean,
                     photoperiod = mean(photoperiod)) |> 
  add_Date_col() |> 
  left_join(exercise, by = c("site", "Id", "Date")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x=commute, y = MEDI)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = site))+
  geom_smooth(method = "gam") +
  scale_color_manual(values = melidos_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "symlog", breaks = c(0, 10^(0:5))) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  labs(y = "Daily mean melanopic EDI (lx)",
       x = "Commute time (minutes)") +
  guides(color = "none")

ggsave("figures/exploration/commute.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  aggregate_Datetime(unit = "1 day",
                     numeric.handler = mean,
                     photoperiod = mean(photoperiod)) |> 
  add_Date_col() |> 
  left_join(exercise, by = c("site", "Id", "Date")) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x=sedentary, y = MEDI)) +
  geom_point(aes(colour = site))+
  geom_smooth(method = "gam") +
  scale_color_manual(values = melidos_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "symlog", breaks = c(0, 10^(0:5))) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  labs(y = "Daily mean melanopic EDI (lx)",
       x = "Sedentary time (minutes)") +
  guides(color = "none")

ggsave("figures/exploration/sedentary.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  add_Date_col() |> 
  left_join(exercise, by = c("site", "Id", "Date")) |> 
  group_by(intensity) |> 
  aggregate_Date(
    unit = "1 hour",
    numeric.handler = \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    date.handler = \(x) as_date("2025-01-01")
  ) |> 
  filter_out(is.na(intensity)) |> 
  mutate(intensity = 
           fct_relabel(intensity, \(x) str_remove_all(x, "\\s.*$"))) |> 
  gg_doubleplot(geom = "line",
                aes_col = intensity,
                facetting = FALSE,
                linewidth = 1,
                alpha = 1) +
  labs(color = "Intensity of activity")

ggsave("figures/exploration/intensity.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  add_Date_col() |> 
  left_join(exercise, by = c("site", "Id", "Date")) |> 
  group_by(location) |> 
  aggregate_Date(
    unit = "1 hour",
    numeric.handler = \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    date.handler = \(x) as_date("2025-01-01")
  ) |> 
  filter_out(is.na(location)) |> 
  mutate(location = 
           fct_relabel(location, \(x) str_remove_all(x, "\\s.*$"))) |> 
  gg_doubleplot(geom = "line",
                aes_col = location,
                facetting = FALSE,
                linewidth = 1,
                alpha = 1) +
  labs(color = "Location of activity")

ggsave("figures/exploration/intensity.pdf", height = 4.5)
```

## Light source

```{r}
mHLEA <- load_data("lightexposurediary") |> flatten_data()
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  add_states(mHLEA) |> 
  aggregate_Datetime(unit = "1 hour",
                     numeric.handler = mean,
                     photoperiod = mean(photoperiod)) |>
  mutate(
    lightsource_primary = 
      lightsource_primary |> 
      fct_collapse(
        Electric = c("Electric light source indoors", "Electric light source outdoors"),
        Daylight = c("Daylight outdoors (including shade)", "Daylight indoors"),
        Screen = "Emissive display light",
        Sleep = c("Darkness during sleep", "Light entering from outside during sleep")
      )
      ) |> 
  filter_out(is.na(lightsource_primary)) |> 
  ggplot(aes(x=lightsource_primary, y = MEDI)) +
  geom_jitter(aes(col = site))+
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.75)+
  scale_color_manual(values = melidos_colors) +
  scale_y_continuous(trans = "symlog", breaks = c(0, 10^(0:5)), labels = c(0, 1, 10, 100, 1000, 10000, 100000)) +
  theme_cowplot() +
  labs(y = "Daily mean melanopic EDI (lx)",
       x = "Primary lightsource") +
  guides(color = "none")

ggsave("figures/exploration/lightsource.pdf", height = 4.5, width = 8)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  add_states(mHLEA) |> 
  filter_out(is.na(act_working_outdoor)) |> 
  group_by(act_working_outdoor) |> 
  aggregate_Date(unit = "1 hour",
                     numeric.handler =  \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    date.handler = \(x) as_date("2025-01-01")) |>
    gg_doubleplot(geom = "line",
                aes_col = act_working_outdoor,
                facetting = FALSE,
                linewidth = 1,
                alpha = 1) +
  labs(color = "Working outdoors")

ggsave("figures/exploration/activity_outdoors.pdf", height = 4.5, width = 8)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  add_states(mHLEA) |> 
  filter_out(is.na(act_road_vehicle)) |> 
  group_by(act_road_vehicle) |> 
  aggregate_Date(unit = "1 hour",
                     numeric.handler =  \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    date.handler = \(x) as_date("2025-01-01")) |>
    gg_doubleplot(geom = "line",
                aes_col = act_road_vehicle,
                facetting = FALSE,
                linewidth = 1,
                alpha = 1) +
  labs(color = "In transit (vehicle)")

ggsave("figures/exploration/activity_road_vehicle.pdf", height = 4.5, width = 8)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  add_states(mHLEA) |> 
  filter_out(is.na(act_free_outdoor)) |> 
  group_by(act_free_outdoor) |> 
  aggregate_Date(unit = "1 hour",
                     numeric.handler =  \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    date.handler = \(x) as_date("2025-01-01")) |>
  gap_handler(full.days = TRUE) |> 
    gg_doubleplot(geom = "line",
                aes_col = act_free_outdoor,
                facetting = FALSE,
                linewidth = 1,
                alpha = 1) +
  labs(color = "Free time outdoors")

ggsave("figures/exploration/activity_free_outdoor.pdf", height = 4.5, width = 8)
```

```{r}
light_glasses_processed2 |> 
  add_states(mHLEA) |> 
  filter_out(is.na(act_home)) |> 
  group_by(act_home) |> 
  aggregate_Date(unit = "1 hour",
                     numeric.handler =  \(x) median(x, na.rm = TRUE),
    date.handler = \(x) as_date("2025-01-01")) |>
  gap_handler(full.days = TRUE) |> 
    gg_doubleplot(geom = "line",
                aes_col = act_home,
                facetting = FALSE,
                linewidth = 1,
                alpha = 1) +
  labs(color = "Being at home")

ggsave("figures/exploration/activity_home.pdf", height = 4.5, width = 8)
```
